testing_tools: OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite, Custom Jest Scripts
test_scenarios: ["Attempt to bypass NestJS AuthGuard on protected Vendor routes without JWT","Attempt to access Admin-only endpoints with a Vendor Contact role JWT (Privilege Escalation)","Replay a captured valid JWT after logout (Session Invalidation check)","Brute-force login endpoint to verify rate limiting trigger (5 attempts/minute)"]
acceptance_criteria: Zero unauthorized access; 401/403 returned for all invalid roles/tokens.
reporting_requirements: Pass/Fail report with reproduction steps attached to Jira tickets
trend_analysis: Track frequency of broken access control regressions

testing_tools: AWS Macie, Custom Regex Scanners, Jest
test_scenarios: ["Upload SOW containing real SSNs/Credit Card numbers; verify redacted in S3 before LLM transmission","Verify OpenAI API request payloads in logs do not contain unmasked PII","Check RDS pgvector storage to ensure embeddings are not generated from raw PII","Verify S3 bucket policies deny public access and enforce SSE-KMS encryption"]
acceptance_criteria: 100% redaction of PII entities defined in data classification policy.
reporting_requirements: Audit log of all PII detection events
trend_analysis: PII leakage incidents count per sprint

test_scenarios: ["Force failure in Stripe Adapter step; verify Ledger entry is rolled back (Compensating Transaction)","Attempt double-payout by sending concurrent requests for the same milestone","Verify idempotency keys are enforced on Stripe/Wise API calls","Verify Ledger entries are immutable (no UPDATE/DELETE permissions for app user)"]
acceptance_criteria: Zero ledger inconsistencies; Atomic transaction behavior observed.

test_scenarios: ["Send Stripe webhook payload with invalid signature header","Replay a valid Stripe webhook payload (Replay Attack prevention via timestamp/ID check)","Send malformed JSON to webhook endpoint to trigger unhandled exception","Verify webhook endpoint processes events asynchronously to prevent timeout denial of service"]
acceptance_criteria: All invalid signatures rejected (400/401); No double processing of events.

test_scenarios: ["Upload malicious CSV (CSV Injection/Formula Injection)","Upload executable disguised as PDF (MIME type bypass)","Upload 10GB file to test DoS protections (Multipart stream limits)","Path traversal attempt via filename manipulation (e.g., ../../etc/passwd)"]
acceptance_criteria: Malware detected/blocked; Files strictly validated by magic number; Stream limits enforced.

test_scenarios: ["Scan Terraform plan for unencrypted EBS volumes or open Security Groups","Verify EKS pods are not running as root (SecurityContext check)","Check for hardcoded secrets in environment variables or codebase","Verify Audit Logging is enabled on all AWS resources (CloudTrail, RDS Logs)"]
acceptance_criteria: Zero critical/high misconfigurations; 100% IaC scan pass.
